recommendations.title: Charm City Kings
recommendations.overview: Mouse desperately wants to join The Midnight Clique, the infamous Baltimore dirt bike riders who rule the summertime streets. When Midnight’s leader, Blax, takes 14-year-old Mouse under his wing, Mouse soon finds himself torn between the straight-and

recommendations.title: Noriko's Dinner Table
recommendations.overview: A teenager named Noriko Shimabara runs away from her family in Toyokawa, to meet Kumiko, the leader of an Internet BBS, Haikyo.com. She becomes involved with Kumiko's family circle, which grows darker after the mass suicide of 54 high school girls.

recommendations.title: The Newton Boys
recommendations.overview: The story of the Newton gang, the most successful bank robbers in history, owing to their good planning and minimal violence.

recommendations.title: Savage Streets
recommendations.overview: Brenda, vivacious leader of the "Satins", a fun-loving group of pretty high school girls, searches for deadly vengeance against the gang members who assaulted her deaf-mute sister.

recommendations.title: As the Gods Will
recommendations.overview: High school student Shun Takahata is bored. Bored with the day-to-day monotony of school and life, he prays for change, for something exciting. Suddenly, he and his classmates are forced to play deadly children's games and facing terrifying creatures

recommendations.title: The Class
recommendations.overview: An average guy of an Estonian high-school decides to defend his bullied classmate. This starts a war between him and the informal leader of the class.

recommendations.title: I Kill Giants
recommendations.overview: Sophia, a new high school student, tries to make friends with Barbara, who tells her that “she kills giants,” protecting this way her hometown and its inhabitants, who do not understand her strange behavior.

recommendations.title: Pushpa 2 - The Rule
recommendations.overview: As his smuggling empire grows, a brazen Pushpa longs for power and respect on his vengeful journey, while facing old rivals and new.

recommendations.title: Skin
recommendations.overview: A destitute young man, raised by racist skinheads and notorious among white supremacists, turns his back on hatred and violence to transform his life, with the help of a black activist and the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: I Believe
recommendations.overview: A 9 year old boy experiences God's power in a supernatural way.
